$comment: DESCRIPTIVE registry, diffed at dev time by scripts/spec_check.py (SC1). NEVER read by validate_run.py (PRESERVES every guarantee). Grouping derived mechanically from validate_run.LABELS.

entries.title: I1: verifier/panelist independence (executor reasoning unseen)
I1b: maker != checker (persona distinctness)
I1c: artifact/declaration persona reconciliation (executor != verifier at the artifact level)
I1d: every working persona is a confirmed personas.json roster member
I2: ledger-is-truth (fsm-state.json is authoritative)
I3: work graph is an acyclic, fail-closed DAG
I3b: wave layering respects dependency order
I3c: dependency closure (no dangling deps)
I4: iteration ceiling and loop-bound cross-check
I5: per-unit budget cap <= 32K tokens + within-budget honesty
I6: PASS coverage-first / FAIL names a genuine defect
I7: exactly one recommended option
I8: no open material ambiguity survives clarification
I9: every executed unit has verification and a debrief
I10: synthesis completeness over all units
I11: global tag registry and controlled tag vocabulary
I12: learnings admission gate, selector, and advisory propagation
I13: socratic self-interrogation carries a genuine counter
I-dod: Definition-of-Done and non-goals are present
I14: AO-2 do_not_touch disjointness (never re-verify a PASS)
I15: AO-6 responsive change on retry
I16: panel discipline and loop-until-dry bound
I17: frozen executed prefix + amendment reconciliation under amendment
I18: amendment fuel conservation bound + records-required trigger
I19: amendment scope traceability, kind closure, and gating
I20: per-unit DoD binding (dod_refs) — adoption closure, verbatim membership, brief mirror
I21: per-unit non-goal binding (non_goal_refs) — adoption closure ([] = explicit none), verbatim membership, brief mirror

I22: verify-time guardrail-compliance block — adoption closure over verdict-bearing verifies, verbatim non-goal membership, violated+PASS forbidden, non_goal_refs coverage; presence/shape only — whether a respected row is TRUE stays verifier attestation (presence-not-genuineness)

I23: Phase-8 DoD / non-goal closure — at P8/DONE (I10's phase gate) every definition_of_done item must be referenced by some PASS-verified unit's dod_refs and every non-goal attested respected/not-applicable by a PASS unit's rows, each clause under its WP-1 / WP-3 adoption gate

I24: artifact-driven ambiguity-register floor — once any structural artifact exists (the I-dod trigger union), a parsed clarifications.json must carry a non-empty ambiguity_register; none-found is recorded as an explicit register item (validator-only floor, no schema minItems; NOT archive-silent — I-dod precedent)

I25: resolution required on resolved material items — a register item with materiality material and resolved true must carry non-blank resolution text (validator mirror of the clarifications schema conditional, I15-style backstop on the raw parse; NOT archive-silent)
AO-1: monotone iteration counter, never reset
AO-2: never re-verify a PASS (mechanized via I14)
AO-3: no vague FAIL (structured defect required)
AO-4: external-signal gate before adjudication
AO-5: genuine split escalates to a human
AO-6: retry requires new evidence / responsive change (via I15)
AO-7: verifier independence re-established each iteration
Limitation A: attestation is verifier-blind
Limitation B: PASS correctness, locators, and socratic genuineness unverifiable
Limitation C: token-report truthfulness is self-reported
Limitation D: genuine model-behind-persona is unverifiable
Limitation E: a tag denotes a real pattern only by discipline
Limitation F: I14/I15 authoritativeness rests on honest artifacts
Limitation G: V_tag_eff trust carve-out
Limitation H: panel presence checked, not substance
Limitation I: human_gate genuineness unverifiable
Limitation J: frontier_wave assumption
Limitation K: split serves dod_refs only by discipline
Unit-id consistency: debrief unit_id matches its directory
G-brief: every decomposed unit has an offline brief before execution
G-personas: persona-selection gate is fail-closed and non-skippable
G2: user learnings-store discovery and override precedence
G3: learning promotion is advisory (print-only, non-gating)
G5: learnings decay / garbage-collection
IMP-07: malformed imported store context dropped (non-gating)
N-15: unimplemented schema keyword tolerated by mini-validator
P3: learnings expiry grammar (03/P3)
P5: learnings contradiction detection (03/P5)
ESCALATE origin provenance (retries==2 & FAIL, DISAGREE, or amendment-fuel exhaustion)
gate-ordering: phase gates satisfied in order (incl. sign-off)
learnings: non-canonical learnings.json shape tolerated
validator_label_prefixes: learnings.json non-canonical shape tolerated (bare single-entry object wrapped as [entry])

entries.title: premise-check: intake premise deflection re-run and attested
schema: artifacts validate against their JSON Schemas
store: learnings-store discovered
selfcheck: debrief acceptance_self_check vs verifier verdict (advisory, non-gating)

I26: sources register — once post-clarification structural work exists (the I-dod/I24 trigger union), a schema-valid sources.json must exist with >=1 row and >=1 consulted row (fail-closed on absence); raw-parse .strip() completeness per disposition; unique source/venue ids; every venue carries non-blank K-A/B/C rationale; a consulted/queued T-COMM row links to an admitted venue while a REJECTED one needs only a resolvable venue_ref; every coverage based_on resolves to register ids and includes >=1 consulted row. NOT archive-silent (I-dod/I24 precedent); offline post-hoc, gates no transition (PRESERVES)

I27: clarification dimension-coverage sweep — offline post-hoc with a two-level version-honest trigger: T1 (presence) fires when the I-dod/I24 structural union holds AND validator_version >= the shipping release (semver on fsm-state.json.validator_version), so archived/UNSTAMPED runs stay SILENT (the deliberate asymmetry with I26); T2 (shape) fires whenever dimension_sweep is present, any version (adoption = submission, the I20/I21 pattern). Checks I27-1..I27-11 (NOTEs at -6/-7/-11): sweep present; nine-dimension exact-once coverage at every tier; per-entry completeness (found => register_ids resolve; clean => .strip()-non-blank search_statement); cartography_round record + status/register_id resolution vs RUN_DIR/sources.json; resolution_source on resolved rows; material+logged-default advisory; normalized duplicate-statement advisory; prompt-verbatim => prompt_span receipt; clean->found flip rule; P8/DONE whole-run sweep_spot_check[] presence; all-found-all-minor advisory. Gates no transition, never guards LT7 (PRESERVES); disposition genuineness stays attestation (Limitation Q)

I28: human-gated depth-tier floors — offline post-hoc, ADOPTION-GATED / ARCHIVE-SILENT (fires ONLY when fsm-state carries a depth block; a depth-absent run is wholly silent, the archive-safe leg). P0 shape+contentfulness (.strip() bar on stakes/reversibility/external_surface.detail); P1 gate provenance (depth => personas_confirmed; clarification-gate confirmation => clarification_resolved); P1b unconditional Phase-2 second touch (personas+clarification_resolved => phase2_touch{kept|raised}; a raise => an overrides[] entry at_gate P2_CLARIFICATION); P2 canonical skipped_floors disclosure == {DT-K2,DT-K4,DT-K5,DT-K6}@confirmed_tier for light/standard, [] iff full; P3 ratchet (upward-only chain from confirmed_tier, tier == last override .to, else tier == confirmed_tier — no representable downward move); P3b override time-scoping (recorded tier_at_verification in the passed-tier set; a pending unit PASSing below its raised floor is a FAIL; pre-override PASS units keep their floors); P4 floor conformance (DT-K2 per-unit tier-scaled probe/chase set vs debrief fallback rows; DT-K4 full-tier nine-dimension whole-run sweep_spot_check; DT-K5 T-VENDOR/T-COMM consultation rows; DT-K6 full-tier design/schema/validator panel[]); P5 external-surface consistency (project-local kind vs a PASS unit's external-tier evidence). Gates NO FSM transition, never guards LT7 (PRESERVES); stakes/reversibility genuineness + probe/label authorship stay attestation (Limitation R)

I29: execution-effort briefs — offline post-hoc, ADOPTION-GATED (the I20/I21 closure pattern): the closure + clauses 2-5 fire ONLY once some brief.json carries claims_owed or required_sources (a zero-adoption run stays wholly silent, the archive-safe leg — §11 R-7); clause 1 (queued-consumer closure) is adoption-INDEPENDENT, riding I26's structurally-triggered register. Clause 1: every register row queued_for a current graph unit whose brief.json exists is named in that brief's required_sources[].source_id or some claims_owed[].source_ref (lens-A tension 2). Closure: every on-disk brief carries claims_owed (entries, or [] + claims_owed_none_reason). Clause 2 (owed-entry shape / no-straw): unique id, type in the seven literals, trigger_ref VERBATIM in acceptance_criteria ∪ dod_refs, min_tier present iff source-native type and in the three-tier enum (raw-parse mirror of schema B1/B2). Clause 3 (register linkage): required_sources[].source_id ∈ register ids, tier mirrors the row, a rejected row cannot be required, present claims_owed[].source_ref ∈ ids. Clause 4 (bridge presence): non-empty owed/reqs => the canonical CB-1 bridge criterion ∈ acceptance_criteria, whitespace-normalized ONLY — this is what preserves I6 FAIL-ability. Clause 5 (explicit-none, CO-2 fold): claims_owed present and [] => non-blank claims_owed_none_reason, trigger = key adoption never dod_refs. NOTEs: owed-heavy brief; tier-shape mismatch. Reads RAW briefs (schema-invalid briefs still get the shape checks; missing keys read safely). Gates NO FSM transition, never guards LT7 (PRESERVES); owed-derivation adequacy stays attestation (Limitation S)

I30: retrieval coverage verify — offline post-hoc, ADOPTION-GATED + forced linkage (the I22 pattern extended to the verify side): the block fires once ANY verdict-bearing verify carries retrieval_coverage OR an owing brief (non-empty claims_owed/required_sources) has a verdict-bearing verify; a brief-ONLY adopting unit (owing brief, NO verify) never triggers it, and a zero-adoption run stays wholly silent (the archive-safe leg, §11 R-7). Forced linkage: an owing brief whose unit has a verdict-bearing verify => that verify carries retrieval_coverage. Verify-side closure: once any verify carries it, every verdict-bearing verify must. Clause 0 tier stamp (fsm-state depth block present => tier_at_verification present; I30-0 owns PRESENCE, I28-P4 the VALUE). Clause 1 totality+shape (owed_check ids == brief claims_owed ids by set EQUALITY; every row_refs/row_ref a valid evidence_table index). Clause 2 coverage arithmetic re-computed (row_refs NON-EMPTY on covered/covered-downgraded — the RT-1 vacuous-pass mirror; each counted row carries the owed id in covers_owed with matching type; owed min_tier read EXISTENTIALLY against U01's satisfaction lattice; a parametric-only counted row or a T-COMM-vendor-silent sole support of a T-VENDOR obligation forces covered-downgraded — no downgrade laundering). Clause 3 PASS-with-uncovered contradiction FAIL (verdict PASS with an uncovered owed id, or a required_sources sources_check row not-consulted — the headline; covered-downgraded on PASS is legal). Clause 4 probe floor+shape (probe row_ref in range, kind in reopen|chase, non-blank outcome; empty retrieval_probes => non-blank retrieval_probes_none_reason; a T-VENDOR/T-COMM-covered owed forces >=1 probe — tier-independent FLOOR, DT-K2 scales on top). Clause 5 target-list floor (sources_check source_ids superset of required_sources ∪ claims_owed source_ref ∪ S-id tokens parsed from claims_owed[].note ∪ S-ids parsed from context_pointers matching ^S<n>:). Clause 6 consulted-evidenced join (a consulted-evidenced sources_check row => a debrief evidence row carries that S-id in source_refs). Clause 7 unreachable-declared join (an unreachable-declared row => the debrief residual_risks carries the canonical 'unreachable: S<n>' declaration). NOTEs: covers_owed fan-out; covers_owed dangling. Reads RAW verify/brief/debrief (missing keys read safely). Gates NO FSM transition, never guards LT7 (PRESERVES); probe/consultation genuineness stays attestation (Limitation S)

I31: RL-1 rung presence — offline post-hoc, ADOPTION-GATED / ARCHIVE-SILENT (fires only once some debrief evidence row carries source_tier/retrieval_rung; this release + archives carry none => wholly silent). For every RL-1-TRIGGERING row (type in {empirical-world-fact, api-tool-contract}, PLUS provenance-quote/numeric-quantitative rows with a URL-shaped evidence locator — RT-7): source_tier present and in the four-tier enum; source_tier in {T-VENDOR,T-COMM} => retrieval_rung in {live-fetch,vendored-docs,cached-copy} AND non-blank accessed; source_tier T-PARAM => retrieval_rung parametric-only; retrieval_rung cached-copy => the evidence names a verifier-reachable LOCAL path that exists (RT-3 decidable core; quote-presence-at-path stays the verifier's E6 duty); vendor_silent true => non-blank vendor_surface_searched. A T-LOCAL row needs only a present source_tier (no ladder — PLAN §2 table). Gates NO FSM transition, never guards LT7 (PRESERVES); highest-reachable-rung genuineness stays attestation (Limitation T / R-a/R-b)

I32: RL-2 parametric-downgrade consistency — offline post-hoc, ADOPTION-GATED / ARCHIVE-SILENT (fires only once some evidence row is parametric-only; this release + archives carry none => wholly silent). RL-2's THREE checks on every parametric-only evidence row (PLAN §2.1 §3, lines 304-307): (a) the evidence text carries an 'ASSUMPTION:' label; (b) for each owed id it covers via covers_owed, the debrief's residual_risks[] names that claim (RT-8 presence check); (c) if it covers an owed id, the debrief's top-level confidence is NOT 'high'. The confidence cap is an OFFLINE artifact-content rule (I6/D1 class, PLAN line 1576), NOT a live gate — R-g's 'no gate keys on confidence' bars only a LIVE FSM-transition gate keyed on confidence. The T-PARAM <=> parametric-only coherence stays in RL-1/I31, not re-checked here. All string/enum/set checks over the RAW debrief; missing keys read safely. Gates NO FSM transition, never guards LT7 (PRESERVES)

I33: RL-3 premise-extraction presence — offline post-hoc, ADOPTION-GATED / ARCHIVE-SILENT (fires only once some evidence row carries extracted_premises / extracted_premises_none_reason). Scoped to DESIGN-JUDGMENT rows ONLY (PLAN §5.0 PR-4 flag — never every row): each design-judgment row carries extracted_premises, a non-empty array whose every entry equals the `claim` of ANOTHER row in the same evidence_table (I20-style verbatim membership, decidable); an empty array requires a non-blank extracted_premises_none_reason (the I21 explicit-none pattern). Extraction ADEQUACY stays honest residual R-f (attestation), not a pretended predicate. Gates NO FSM transition, never guards LT7 (PRESERVES)

I34: CO-1 per-entry owed coverage — offline post-hoc, ADOPTION-GATED / ARCHIVE-SILENT (fires only once some brief carries a non-empty claims_owed list; this release + archives carry none => silent). Fires per unit whose brief owes AND has a debrief: for EVERY owed entry E there is >=1 debrief evidence row R with E.id in R.covers_owed, R.type == E.type, and (E.min_tier present => R satisfies it per U01's satisfaction lattice — the same existential lattice as I30). Verify-INDEPENDENT (PLAN §4): catches an uncovered owed id even where no retrieval_coverage block exists — I30's complement. CO-2 (explicit-none) is NOT re-added (folded into I29-5, PLAN §5.6); owed-derivation ADEQUACY stays residual R-d (attestation). Gates NO FSM transition, never guards LT7 (PRESERVES)

Dialogue transcript presence & shape — version-gated (T1 @1.10.0) presence + adoption (T2) shape over dialogues.json; offline post-hoc, no FSM edge/flag/guard (PRESERVES); genuineness is Limitation U/V

Dialogue disposition & presentation-bind — three-arm union, maxItems:4 anti-stuffing, recommended-echo counter-join, forbid residue + register-row coverage; offline (PRESERVES); presentation fidelity is Limitation U

Dialogue termination & probe accounting — enum + conditional payloads, rung-choice legality (human-early carve-out), instance closure with license injectivity; offline (PRESERVES); unrecorded-trigger residual Limitation V

Ask-first consequential-default legality — CC(K1∨K2) materiality-blind; split trigger T1/T1h/T1v/T2 @1.10.0; loud declared halt (N-I38); I27 + I8 carried BYTE-UNTOUCHED; offline post-hoc, no FSM edge/flag/guard, never guards LT7 (PRESERVES); residuals Limitation W (R1–R8)

Anchor confirmation, provenance & baseline integrity — fail-closed item_confirmations + anchors_baseline (dissent 1); immutable-baseline replay vs coordinated rewrite (dissent 2, I17 pattern); GV-29 REVISES artifact contract for new runs (offline, version-gated); transcript-file integrity Limitation X; offline post-hoc, no FSM edge/flag/guard (PRESERVES)

Anchor mutation gating — revise_anchors always-gated (GV-13); fuel cost 1 / fuel-0 unwritable via I18 VERBATIM (no fuel REVISES); ref-reconciliation (GV-15); membership-union (GV-16 REVISES I20/21/22, current ∪ retired) + later-record rule; violated-target P7 routing (GV-18); narrowed add_units autonomy (GV-25 REVISES I19); offline post-hoc per-unit PRESERVES, never guards LT7
